{
  "weights": {

    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.3,
    "RX.1": 1.0,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": [
    "R1.1",
    "R1.2",
    "R1.3",
    "R1.4",
    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Strengthening the abstract benefits from sharpening the core contribution and problem framing.",
    "R1.2": "A tighter argument chain is needed to convincingly link abstention, clarification, and improved task success.",
    "R1.3": "Claims about performance gains and unchanged accuracy must be clearly supported by the reported results.",
    "R1.4": "The 'first' claim requires careful positioning versus the closest prior approaches to justify novelty.",
    "R1.6": "Concise, high-impact phrasing and improved flow will make the writing more persuasive.",
    "RX.1": "Disclose residual uncertainties, especially around novelty and generalization beyond the synthetic/test settings.",
    "RX.2": "Avoid overclaiming causality or uniqueness, particularly regarding being 'first' and attributing gains solely to abstention.",
    "RX.3": "Keep efforts scoped to strengthening the abstract text without inventing new data or experiments.",
    "RX.4": "Ensure language does not imply unsafe deployment readiness or obscure failure modes in ambiguous scenes.",
    "RX.5": "Keep all strengthened claims traceable to stated datasets, methods, metrics, and released artifacts."
  }
}

rationale.R1.1: Strengthening the abstract benefits from sharpening the core contribution and problem framing.
rationale.R1.2: A tighter argument chain is needed to convincingly link abstention, clarification, and improved task success.
rationale.R1.3: Claims about performance gains and unchanged accuracy must be clearly supported by the reported results.
rationale.R1.4: The 'first' claim requires careful positioning versus the closest prior approaches to justify novelty.
rationale.R1.6: Concise, high-impact phrasing and improved flow will make the writing more persuasive.
rationale.RX.1: Disclose residual uncertainties, especially around novelty and generalization beyond the synthetic/test settings.
rationale.RX.2: Avoid overclaiming causality or uniqueness, particularly regarding being 'first' and attributing gains solely to abstention.
rationale.RX.3: Keep efforts scoped to strengthening the abstract text without inventing new data or experiments.
rationale.RX.4: Ensure language does not imply unsafe deployment readiness or obscure failure modes in ambiguous scenes.
rationale.RX.5: Keep all strengthened claims traceable to stated datasets, methods, metrics, and released artifacts.
